strategy: action_pooling — read-only tasks batch; ref docs/ACTION-POOLING-AND-BATCHING.md
token_budget: max_tokens=1024 per provider call; context slimmed via symbol mesh (top 8 symbols passed); CSF compression on save

agent_slots.description: Wire /api/agents/slots in routes/dreamer.js — slot_loader.py exists, HTTP route not registered
test_three_doors.js: verify [DOORS:] parsed, cleanText strips it, 3 chips rendered in browser
Persist CTF glyphs in dream entries; surface in stats/search; update entry schema in dream.js
Add TTS voice selector to settings drawer (name/rate/pitch from SpeechSynthesis.getVoices)
Auto-update data/pcsf/*.pcsf.json on server start from live provider + journal state
Verify GEMINI_GROUNDING=true with paid key; update .env.example + health.pcsf.json
Backend Vosk STT fallback for non-Chrome; route POST /api/dream/transcribe

notes: Gemini key rate-limited until daily quota reset. Use ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY as fallback for agent work.
